justhodl-data-collector.description: Collects historical data - safe to delete

justhodl-onchain-ratios.description: BTC + ETH on-chain ratios (Glassnode-equivalent): MVRV, NVT, hash rate, ETH gas, ETH supply growth. CoinMetrics + mempool.space + etherscan.

justhodl-divergence-interpreter.description: Regime-conditional divergence interpreter — Claude analyzes 70 cross-asset divergences in context of macro nowcast regime.

justhodl-pnl-tracker.description: Loop 2 — hypothetical PnL tracker (B&H vs khalid_strategy)

justhodl-ultimate-orchestrator.description: Complete orchestrator with all agents and full data capabilities

justhodl-liquidity-flow.description: TGA + RRP + WALCL daily delta tracker. Net liquidity regime classification.

justhodl-crisis-plumbing.description: Phase 9.1 — official crisis indices + plumbing tier 2 + XCC basis proxy

justhodl-cot-extremes-scanner.description: Phase 2A — COT positioning percentile extremes scanner

justhodl-event-study.description: Event Study Automation — algorithmic detection + forward returns

justhodl-divergence-scanner.description: Phase 1B — Cross-asset divergence scanner (12 macro pairs)

justhodl-position-sizer-v2.description: Horizon-aware Kelly position sizer for paper portfolio + asymmetric setups

justhodl-yield-curve.description: Yield Curve Shape Decomposition — full nominal + real + breakeven curve

justhodl-nyfed-dealer-survey.description: NY Fed Survey of Primary Dealers — quarterly market expectations from the 24 banks moving the most flow. Weekly check for new release.

justhodl-exchange-flows.description: BTC/ETH exchange flows — accumulation/distribution regime via CoinMetrics.

justhodl-oecd-cli.description: OECD Composite Leading Indicators across 16 major economies. Predicts business cycle turning points 6-9 months ahead.

justhodl-forensic-screen.description: Forensic accounting screen — Beneish M-Score + Sloan accruals + WC divergence + goodwill bloat for top 200 SP500. 12h schedule.

justhodl-ab-test.description: A/B test of competing prompt strategies

justhodl-sec-8k.description: SEC 8-K material event filings. Atom feed every 30 min, classifies by Item code, flags red flags (4.02 non-reliance, 1.03 bankruptcy, 5.04 trading halt).

justhodl-sec-13f.description: SEC 13F-HR institutional position tracker. Watches 18 major funds for new quarterly filings (Berkshire, Bridgewater, Citadel, Pershing, etc.).

justhodl-backtest-engine.description: Calibrated alpha replay — backtests historical signals against current calibration weights

justhodl-history-snapshotter.description: Time-series snapshotter: every 5 min reads live data/*.json feeds, dedups by SHA256, writes to DynamoDB justhodl-history with 365d TTL

justhodl-sector-tilt.description: Macro-Regime → Sector Tilt Engine. Reads macro-nowcast+sector-rotation, applies academic regime→sector playbook, surfaces ALIGNED vs MISALIGNED setups (the alpha).

justhodl-macro-surprise.description: Macro Surprise Index — CESI proxy from FRED

justhodl-position-monitor.description: Proactive Telegram alerts on position stop/target events + decisive-call changes

justhodl-prompt-iterator.description: Loop 3 — weekly prompt iterator with safety guardrails

justhodl-history-api.description: Read-only API for justhodl-history DDB. Function URL exposes /index, /snapshot, /latest, /timestamps. Reserved concurrency=5.

justhodl-asymmetric-hunter.description: Layer 4 of nobrainer hunter — fuses Layers 1+2+3 into 5-factor asymmetric score

justhodl-signal-portfolio.description: Per-signal paper portfolio with PnL tracking

justhodl-reports-builder.description: Builds reports/scorecard.json from SSM calibration + DDB signals/outcomes

justhodl-insider-trades.description: SEC EDGAR Form 4 insider-trades pipeline (every 30 min).

justhodl-ultimate-trading.description: Ultimate professional trading platform with TradingView features

justhodl-gdelt-sentiment.description: GDELT 2.0 global news + geopolitical sentiment. Pulls latest 15-min GKG batch, filters financial themes, computes per-asset sentiment.

justhodl-nobrainer-tracker.description: Layer 6 of nobrainer hunter — logs each top call as DDB signal for calibrator

justhodl-aaii-sentiment.description: AAII Investor Sentiment Survey weekly retail bull/bear/neutral. Released Thursdays. Daily check for new release; 26-week z-scores; extreme flags.

justhodl-theme-detector.description: Auto-detect theme lifecycle from 70+ thematic ETFs (DORMANT/EMERGING/ACCELERATING/EXTENDED/PEAKING/COOLING/DYING)

justhodl-macro-nowcast.description: Composite real-time macro nowcast — weighted z-score from 7 FRED series in data/report.json. Runs every 6h.

justhodl-historical-analogs.description: Historical analog finder — 6-dim regime nearest neighbors

justhodl-divergence-engine-v2.description: Phase 2 cross-asset divergence engine — 32 pairs covering labor, manufacturing, LEI, EM/frontier, micro caps, copper, eurodollar centers.

justhodl-watchlist-debate.description: Loop 4 — nightly multi-agent debate via Batch API

justhodl-regime-anomaly.description: Phase 9.2 — HMM regime detector + anomaly detection

justhodl-vix-curve.description: VIX term structure 4h tracker. Yahoo ^VIX family. Regime: contango / flat / backwardation.

justhodl-crisis-knowledge-base.description: Builds Crisis Pattern Knowledge Base — RAG corpus for ai-chat

justhodl-13f-positions.description: 13F position parser. Extracts holdings + computes buys/sells vs prior quarter.

justhodl-api-keys-admin.description: Admin Lambda for managing Public API keys: create, revoke, list, rotate.

justhodl-earnings-tracker.description: Earnings calendar + beat/miss reactivity + PEAD signals

justhodl-stock-ai-research.description: AI research summaries for stock analyzer — company desc, bull/bear cases, scenario-based price targets. 7-day S3 cache.

justhodl-nobrainer-rationale.description: Layer 5 of nobrainer hunter — Claude-written theses + Telegram digest

justhodl-whats-changed.description: Daily diff summarizer — what changed across all data files

justhodl-ka-metrics.description: KA Metrics — Phase 4 of Khalid→KA rebrand (replaces justhodl-khalid-metrics)

justhodl-public-api-demo.description: Reference public API endpoint demonstrating api_auth.py.

justhodl-price-redundancy.description: Stooq + Yahoo Finance free price feed redundancy. Fallback for FMP rate limits. 23 core tickers including BTC/ETH/VIX/DXY/TNX.

justhodl-etf-flows.description: ETF flow tracker — daily $ volume z-scores

justhodl-sec-10kq.description: SEC 10-K (annual) + 10-Q (quarterly) + amended (10-K/A, 10-Q/A) filings. Surfaces restatements which often precede stock drawdowns.

justhodl-charts-agent.description: Professional charting system - separate from main system

justhodl-health-monitor.description: System health monitor — checks S3 freshness, Lambda errors, DDB, SSM, EB. Runs every 15 min.

justhodl-auction-crisis-detector.description: Phase 10 — Treasury auction crisis detector (calibrated from 9 historical PDFs)

justhodl-cache-layer.description: Cache layer for api.justhodl.ai - safe to delete

justhodl-backtest-harness.description: Daily snapshot of all signal types + forward-return tracker. DDB table justhodl-backtest.

justhodl-advanced-charts.description: Advanced charting system with historical data

justhodl-pairs-scanner.description: Pairs trading scanner — 36 curated relative-value pairs across 13 categories. Outputs spread Z-score, half-life, and trade direction for mean-reversion candidates.

justhodl-labor-leading.description: JOLTS + Challenger + Initial Claims labor market leading indicators. Computes openings/unemployed ratio, quits rate z-score, claims 4-week MA trend.

justhodl-options-gamma.description: SPY dealer gamma exposure (GEX). Pulls full options chain via Polygon, computes Black-Scholes gamma, aggregates by strike/expiry, classifies regime.

justhodl-calibration-snapshotter.description: Weekly calibration weight + accuracy snapshotter for time-series tracking

justhodl-redflag-alerter.description: Telegram alerter for serious 8-K events. Reads data/8k-filings.json, dedupes 24h.

justhodl-risk-sizer.description: Phase 3 — Risk management layer (sizing + clustering + circuit breakers)

justhodl-calls-backtest.description: Replays decisive-call ledger as SPY-exposure backtest. Daily.
